issues.title: Shell Injection Vulnerability
issues.description: User input is directly interpolated into shell command without proper escaping or validation. The prompt parameter can contain shell metacharacters that could execute arbitrary commands.
issues.impact: High - Potential arbitrary code execution on the server
issues.solution: Use execFile with arguments array instead of exec with string interpolation, or use a proper shell escaping library like 'shell-escape' or child_process.spawn

issues.title: Incorrect Conditional Logic
issues.description: The Agent initialization is inside the 'else' block of 'if len(sys.argv) > 1:', which means when a task argument IS provided, the Agent is never created. This breaks the core functionality.
issues.currentCode:
if len(sys.argv) > 1:
    task = sys.argv[1]
# Missing else below
    agent = Agent(...)
issues.impact: High - Agent never runs when called with a task argument
issues.solution: Move the Agent initialization outside and after the if-else block, ensuring it runs regardless of how the task is provided

issues.title: Memory Leak - No Browser Resource Cleanup
issues.description: Browser instance and page contexts are created but never properly closed. Each call to getPage() creates a new context that accumulates in memory.
issues.impact: Critical - Memory consumption grows over time, potential server instability
issues.solution: Implement proper cleanup: return {page, context, browser} and provide a cleanup function. Consider using Context Manager pattern or WeakMap for auto-cleanup

issues.title: Continuous 3D Scene Renders Without Visibility Check
issues.description: The 3D scene runs continuous useFrame animations and scroll listeners even when off-screen, consuming GPU/CPU resources unnecessarily.
issues.currentCode: useFrame() runs on every frame regardless of viewport visibility
issues.impact: Medium - Unnecessary GPU usage, reduced performance on lower-end devices, battery drain on mobile
issues.solution: Implement Intersection Observer API to pause frame updates when scene is out of viewport. Use useMemo to memoize component calculations.

issues.title: Unoptimized Scroll Event Listener
issues.description: Scroll event listener updates state on every scroll event without debouncing, causing excessive re-renders
issues.impact: Medium - Triggers re-render on every pixel scrolled (hundreds of times), poor performance on slower devices
issues.solution: Add throttle/debounce using useEffect with proper cleanup. Use requestAnimationFrame for better performance.

issues.title: Untyped Error Handling
issues.description: Using 'any' type for error object in catch block. No proper error type discrimination.
issues.impact: Medium - Error messages may be unclear, potential null/undefined access
issues.solution: Create typed error interfaces and use proper error type checking. Use 'unknown' instead of 'any'

issues.title: Missing Request Validation
issues.description: No schema validation for incoming request body. No input sanitization beyond checking emptiness.
issues.impact: Medium - Vulnerable to malformed requests, potential data consistency issues
issues.solution: Use zod, yup, or next-validate for schema validation. Implement max length, type checking, and malicious content detection

issues.title: Empty Next.js Configuration
issues.description: Next configuration is empty with just a comment. Missing important configs for production.
issues.currentCode: const nextConfig: NextConfig = { /* config options here */ };
issues.impact: Medium - Missing optimization, security headers, and performance configs
issues.solution: Add: image optimization, compression, security headers, CORS if needed, trailing slashes, etc.

issues.title: Non-Functional Mobile Menu Button
issues.description: Mobile hamburger menu button exists but has no onClick handler to toggle menu visibility
issues.impact: Low-Medium - Mobile navigation is broken, poor UX on mobile devices
issues.solution: Add state management for mobile menu, implement toggle functionality with slide-in animation

issues.title: Limited Error Handling in API Call
issues.description: API errors are only logged to console, no user-facing error feedback or retry mechanism
issues.impact: Medium - Users don't know if operation failed, no recovery option
issues.solution: Add error state management, display toast notifications or error messages, implement retry logic

issues.title: Incomplete Quickstart Documentation
issues.description: Quickstart guide references GitHub repo and generic setup but missing specific AutoBrowse configuration details and prerequisites
issues.currentCode: Links to generic github repo and npm i
issues.impact: Low - Users may struggle with initial setup
issues.solution: Add: Python venv setup, GEMINI_API_KEY setup, dependency explanations, troubleshooting section

issues.title: Missing .env.example File
issues.description: No .env.example file to guide developers on required environment variables
issues.impact: Low - New developers don't know what .env variables are needed
issues.solution: Create .env.example with GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, and other required vars with placeholder values

issues.title: Manual Textarea Height Management
issues.description: Custom textarea height adjustment logic instead of using CSS or a form library
issues.impact: Very Low - Works but not idiomatic, could use CSS Grid or container queries
issues.solution: Use CSS field-sizing: content or a form library like React Hook Form with custom textarea

issues.title: Incomplete Pricing Page
issues.description: Pricing page is a placeholder with no actual pricing information or layout
issues.solution: Implement actual pricing structure with tiers, features, comparison table

issues.title: Commented Out Code
issues.description: Header component is commented out in page.tsx but included in layout.tsx, creating duplicate attempts
issues.impact: Very Low - Works but indicates incomplete refactoring
issues.solution: Remove commented code, ensure single Header instance in layout.tsx

issues.title: Lower ES Target
issues.description: TypeScript target is ES2017, which is quite old (2017). Modern browsers support ES2020+
issues.impact: Very Low - Transpiles to older JavaScript, larger bundle size
issues.solution: Update to "target": "ES2020" to generate more modern, smaller output

issues.title: Invalid Transition Duration
issues.description: Tailwind class uses 'duration-30' which doesn't exist in default Tailwind config (should be 300ms or 3000ms)
issues.impact: Very Low - Invalid class silently ignored, no transition effect
issues.solution: Change to valid duration like 'duration-300' or extend Tailwind config with custom duration

issues.title: Generic Metadata
issues.description: Page metadata includes 'Create Next App' placeholder title and description
issues.currentCode: title: "Create Next App", description: "Generated by create next app"
issues.impact: Very Low - Poor SEO and branding
issues.solution: Update with actual project metadata: 'AutoBrowse - AI Browser Automation' etc.

optimizations.title: Tree-shake unused Three.js components
optimizations.description: Only import specific Three.js components instead of full library

optimizations.title: Lazy load 3D Scene component
optimizations.description: Use dynamic import for Scene component since it's heavy and below fold
optimizations.optimizedCode: import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const Scene = dynamic(() => import('./components/Scene'), { ssr: false })

optimizations.title: Memoize expensive Scene calculations
optimizations.description: Wrap shader calculations and geometry creation in useMemo

optimizations.title: Implement request debouncing for scroll
optimizations.description: Debounce scroll listeners in Header component
optimizations.example: Use lodash debounce or custom hook with setTimeout

optimizations.title: Add proper browser session pooling
optimizations.description: Implement a pool/queue manager for browser sessions instead of creating new ones each time

optimizations.title: Add response caching for identical prompts
optimizations.description: Cache results for identical or similar prompts to avoid redundant executions

optimizations.title: Enable image optimization in Next.config
optimizations.description: Add next/image component and optimize images for different device sizes

production.name: next
production.issue: Consider updating to latest stable version for security patches
production.recommendation: Update to v15.x or v16.x latest patch

immediate: Fix shell injection vulnerability in server/run.ts - URGENT
Fix Agent initialization logic in server/agent.py - URGENT
Implement browser resource cleanup in server/browser.ts - URGENT
short-term: Add request validation and sanitization to /api/run
Implement scroll event debouncing in Header component
Add user-facing error handling in Use component
Implement 3D scene lazy loading and viewport detection
long-term: Set up production error tracking (Sentry, etc.)
Add rate limiting and DDoS protection

mainWeaknesses: Logic error in Python agent initialization
Memory leaks in browser session management
summary.readinessForProduction: NOT READY - Critical security issues must be fixed first
